title: Dusty Blue Baby Shower Decorations Oh Welcome Baby Boys Balloon Set with Star Heart Foil Balloons Bunting Banner Bodysuit Paper Garland Boho Pastel Blue Gold White Sand Gender Reveal Party Decor Girls
features: Unique Welcome Baby Theme – Celebrate your little one with this elegant balloon set featuring a blue “WELCOME BABY” banner and a cute baby bodysuit garland. Shiny foil balloons in star and heart shapes bring sparkle, while the balanced mix of blue, beige, and champagne gold balloons creates a warm and stylish atmosphere. Perfect for baby showers, gender reveals, or welcome-home celebrations, this kit makes every moment more memorable.

Balloon Kit – Includes everything you need: 24pcs 12-inch latex balloons in dusty blue, pastel blue, metallic champagne gold, and white sand, plus 2pcs 18-inch light blue foil balloons in star and heart shapes. Also included is a “WELCOME BABY” banner, baby bodysuit garland, 1 roll of ribbon, and 3 sheets of glue dots, giving you a full kit to create balloon arches, bouquets, or backdrops with ease, transforming your home, garden, or event hall into a festive party space quickly.

Premium Material - All our balloons take upgraded latex and aluminum foil material that are much thicker than others, non-toxic, durable, safe, reusable, easy to inflate, but won't blast easily, no worry about scare to your kids. Note: It's normal for the balloons to have a little odor, you can place them in a well-ventilated area to dissipate the smell. Balloons can last a long time, and you can continue to use them next time.

Easy to Assemble – Decorating is quick and simple with this kit. Inflate the balloons with air or helium, hang the “HAPPY BIRTHDAY” banner and garland, and use the included ribbons to tie balloons or create bows for extra charm. Whether you’re decorating a dessert table, photo backdrop, or entryway, you can set up a professional-looking party scene in minutes without needing extra tools, making it stress-free and fun.

Balloon Usage Tips – Please note that colors may appear slightly different due to lighting or screen display. For a better results, inflate balloons to about 85% of their full capacity to prevent bursting. Keep balloons away from direct sunlight, heat, or sharp objects to maintain durability. Adult supervision is recommended when children are playing with balloons. Store unused balloons in a cool, dry place so they remain in great condition for future celebrations.
description: 🎉Welcome Baby Balloon Decoration Set – Elegant Dusty Blue & Champagne Gold Baby Shower Decor🎉 🎈Planning a baby shower or welcome-home party? This dusty blue “WELCOME BABY” balloon set is designed to create a warm and stylish atmosphere for celebrating your little one. With banners, garlands, foil balloons, and a chic mix of latex balloons, it combines elegance and fun to make your event unforgettable.🎈 🎉What’s Included:🎉 🎈24pcs 12-inch latex balloons (dusty fog blue, pastel blue, metallic champagne gold, sand beige white) 🎈2pcs 18-inch foil balloons (star + heart) 🎈1pc “WELCOME BABY” banner 🎈1pc blue paper Bodysuit Onesie garland 🎈1pc ribbon 🎈3 sheets of glue dots 🎉Stylish & Gentle Colors:🎉 🎈The combination of vintage blue, macaron blue, sand beige, and metallic champagne gold creates a soft yet elegant palette. Shiny foil balloons add sparkle, while the banners and baby clothes garland enhance the welcoming theme. This versatile design works beautifully for baby showers, gender reveals, or welcome-home parties.🎈 🎉Quick & Easy Setup:🎉 🎈With all accessories included, decorating is simple and stress-free. Inflate balloons with air or helium, hang the banners and garland, and use the ribbon and glue dots to secure everything. In just minutes, you can create balloon arches, bouquets, or stylish backdrops for dessert tables, photo walls, or entryways.🎈 🎉Perfect for Baby Celebrations:🎉 🎈This kit is ideal for baby showers, newborn welcome parties, or family gatherings. Suitable for indoor or outdoor use, it brings joy and sophistication to any space. From intimate celebrations at home to larger events in banquet halls, this balloon set helps you create lasting memories filled with love and happiness.🎈 🎉Celebrate your little one in style with this Blue & Gold Welcome Baby Balloon Set.🎉
